commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 2:50 These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah; Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim, Caleb, grandson of Calubi. (Vatable) Sobal, his descendant, was prince of those who established themselves at Cariathiarim. (Calmet) The Alexandrian Septuagint seems rather to assert that he was son of Hur, as well as those who follow. "The sons of Hur. Salomon, father of Baithlammon, father of Bethleem. "But the editions vary.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
